items.title: Dallas Mavericks after trading for Zaccharie Risacher. He's a little more likely to get his $17.4 million team option for 2027-28 picked up with this trade.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Dallas Mavericks after trading for Zaccharie Risacher. He's a little more likely to get his $17.4 million team option for 2027-28 picked up with this trade.

They still have $7 million remaining of their Anthony Davis trade exception.

They're out of second-round picks to trade.

items.title: Atlanta Hawks cap situation after trading Zaccharie Risacher for Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Atlanta Hawks cap situation after trading Zaccharie Risacher for Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard.

Dort is currently extension-eligible for up to four years, $95 million over the next six months. He could get more after.

Nembhard will become a restricted free agent after this season.

items.title: FWIW -- There was a French report that Zaccharie Risacher was traveling to Las Vegas to meet the Hawks and I've heard the same from the team side.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
FWIW -- There was a French report that Zaccharie Risacher was traveling to Las Vegas to meet the Hawks and I've heard the same from the team side.

However, he's not expected to play in Summer League games (and isn't on the SL roster).

Just going to be around the team.

items.title: Zaccharie Risacher had 11 points, 6 rebounds, and a block in 25 minutes for France today.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Zaccharie Risacher had 11 points, 6 rebounds, and a block in 25 minutes for France today.

Was a 29-point win over Finland.

items.title: Zaccharie Risacher finished with 9 points (2-4 on twos, 1-2 on threes, 2-3 on free throws), 1 rebound, 1 blocked shot and was +9 in 16 minutes of action in France's World Cup qualifier win over Belgium today.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Zaccharie Risacher finished with 9 points (2-4 on twos, 1-2 on threes, 2-3 on free throws), 1 rebound, 1 blocked shot and was +9 in 16 minutes of action in France's World Cup qualifier win over Belgium today.

France used 12 players and no one played more than 24 minutes.
